name: Bedford Neighborhood Park
description: Bedford Neighborhood Park is a place to play pickleball in Laurel, MD. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free. The court cannot be reserved.

name: Bedford Park
description: Bedford Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Laurel, MD. There are 2 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are private.

name: Belair Swim & Racquet Club
description: Belair Swim & Racquet Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bowie, MD. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Beltsville Seventh-day Adventist Church
description: Beltsville Seventh-day Adventist Church is a place to play pickleball in Beltsville, MD. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Bowie City Municipal Gymnasium
description: Bowie City Municipal Gymnasium is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bowie, MD. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Bowie Community Center
description: Bowie Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Bowie, MD. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Cedar Heights Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Cedar Heights Community Center in Capitol Heights, MD! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Eppley Recreation Center
description: Available for limited hours on Tuesday, Thursday, Sunday only

name: Fairland Sports & Aquatics Complex
description: Fairland Sports & Aquatics Complex is a place to play pickleball in Laurel, MD. There are 9 asphalt courts. 5 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming. Reservations are available.
open_play_schedule: Fairland Picklers can schedule you a private or public session based on availability and number of players.

name: Fairwood Community Association
description: Fairwood Community Association is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bowie, MD. There are 2 outdoor asphalt and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Available to residents of Fairwood Community

name: Foxhill Park
description: Come play pickleball at Foxhill Park in Bowie, MD! There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Glenarden Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Glenarden Community Center in Glenarden, MD! There are 4 hard and wood courts. 1 is outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Hammond Park
description: These are lined tennis courts, not dedicated pickleball courts. Restroom is a porta-potty.
open_play_schedule: Use is predominantly organized groups that do not incorporate drop in players.

name: Junior Tennis Champions Center

The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.
